attributes.additional_details: Labour has broken every promise and commitment, it’s a detriment to the UK and we urgently need, for the sake of civil order, a democratic change in government.
attributes.background:
A vote of no confidence / call a general election. 
The labour government has created more problems than they’ve solved. The current Labour government is not taking appropriate action to protect UK, riddled in incompetence, scandal, drowning in debt and at every turn they fail the people of the UK.

rejection.details:
We also can't accept petitions about appointments, which includes calling for a vote of no confidence in the Government. This is set out in the Committee's standards: https://petition.parliament.uk/help

You may wish to sign the following:

Dissolve Parliament and call a General Election now!
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/750050
